�새 New (published July 10, 2026, Reiwa 8)

AI summary (please check the original article for precise information)

Saitama Prefecture has issued a traffic fatality alert after 5 fatal accidents occurred over 5 days (June 29–July 3, 2026, Reiwa 8).

【Alert Period】
July 5–14, 2026 (Reiwa 8) — 10 days

【Characteristics of the accidents】
• 2 deaths involved motorcycle riders
• 3 accidents occurred in the morning

【Message to pedestrians】
• Use crosswalks and pedestrian overpasses
• Look both ways before crossing; signal your intent with a hand gesture
• During dusk, night, and early morning, wear reflective materials, use lights, and wear bright clothing

【Message to drivers】
• Obey the speed limit and maintain safe following distance
• Pedestrians have priority at crosswalks; drive with consideration
• Pay special attention to pedestrians crossing from the right side of your vehicle (about 70% of fatal accidents involve crossing from the vehicle's right side)
• When near pedestrians or cyclists, maintain safe distance and speed
• Drive with care and consideration toward elderly people
• Turn on headlights early at dusk
• Use high beams appropriately at night
• When turning right, watch for oncoming traffic, crosswalks, and cyclists
• When turning left, check for vehicles that might be swept into the turn

【Message to motorcycle riders】
Wear protective gear and practice safe riding.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jinkenkurashianzen/7837.html
summary: ℹ️ Traffic fatality alert issued for Saitama Prefecture (July 5–14, 2026, Reiwa 8)
